hero.headline: *Skip the big box stores* — we're the locals who deliver
hero.subheadline: New appliances, repair work, and we hook it all up before we leave your house.

services_section.label: WHAT WE FIX
services_section.heading: Every appliance, every problem
services_section.subheading: From washers that won't spin to stoves that won't heat

services.title: Washer & Dryer Repair
services.description: Won't start, won't drain, making weird noises. We fix them all or find you a replacement that actually works.

services.title: Refrigerator Service
services.description: Not cooling, ice maker broken, strange sounds. We diagnose fast and fix it right the first time.

services.title: Stove & Oven Repair
services.description: Burners not heating, oven won't turn on, gas or electric. We handle the repair and test everything before we go.

services.title: New Appliance Sales
services.description: Skip the big chains. We sell quality appliances, deliver them, and hook them up properly.

about.heading: Canton appliance experts
about.body: We're the Canton team that shows up, fixes it right, and makes sure it works before we leave. Real people answering the phone.

reviews.name: Isaac T.
reviews.text: Skip the big chain stores and go to Graber's. I bought a washing machine and the service was phenomenal. The owner is incredibly knowledgeable.

reviews.name: Ms. H.
reviews.text: Shawn sold me an electric stove at a great price. Not only did he deliver it but hooked it up and made sure it worked before he left.

reviews.name: Ashleigh R.
reviews.text: Shawn was so kind and informational! Great prices and very knowledgeable. We'll definitely be back when we need another appliance.

cta.heading: Ready to fix that appliance?
cta.body: Call us or get a quick quote. We'll tell you straight if it's worth fixing or time for a replacement.
